message:
ui(layout_lab): suppress recovery summary line when no notice is active

`pane_workspace_recovery_notice` is `None` during normal operation —
no workspace was just imported, no fallback decision was made.
Previously the info-pane fallback produced the literal string
\"Recovery: none\", which then formatted into the panel's last line as
a stale-looking metadata header that never went anywhere useful for
the user.

Switch the `map_or_else` fallback from
`|| \"Recovery: none\".to_string()` to `String::new`, so the trailing
`{}` in the format string expands to an empty placeholder when no
recovery is in flight. When a recovery actually happens,
`PaneWorkspaceRecoveryNotice::summary()` still produces its full
\"Recovery: <decision> src:<v> sum:<chk> <evidence>\" line as
before — that path is unchanged.

No test updates needed: the recovery summary integration test
(layout_lab.rs:3371) asserts the present-recovery rendering only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
